query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime exterior view of a multi-story building with a vertical illuminated sign reading 'Madison HOTEL' in mixed cursive and block lettering attached to the left side of the frame. The upper portion features a brick facade with exposed electrical conduit and a window containing an air conditioning unit, while the lower level has horizontal architectural molding. Some surfaces are lit while large portions of the scene remain dark.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime exterior view of a multi-story building with a vertical illuminated sign reading 'Madison HOTEL' in mixed cursive and block lettering attached to the left side of the frame, pervaded by a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast. The unhealthy tint shifts the brick facade, painted architectural molding, and other surfaces toward unsettling, contaminated hues. The upper portion shows exposed electrical conduit and a window containing an air conditioning unit, while the lower level features horizontal molding bands. Large areas of the structure recede into deep shadow.
